title: Firebase Authentication
objectives: Enforce access with custom claims + rules

sections.markdown: Firebase Authentication is a managed identity service supporting email/password, phone (OTP), social (Google, Apple, Facebook, Twitter, GitHub), anonymous, and custom-token sign-in. It issues short-lived JWTs that other Firebase services trust automatically.
Custom claims (set via the Admin SDK) let you store roles/tenants on the user's token itself. Combined with Security Rules, you can enforce authorization declaratively — no per-endpoint code.
Trusting `auth.currentUser` on the client for authorization decisions. The token is what other services trust; always enforce access in Security Rules or on the server, never only in the app.

Apple Sign-In is REQUIRED by Apple if you offer any third-party social login. Enable App Check to block abuse (attestation before Firebase accepts requests). Use `authStateChanges()` (not one-off calls) for reactive UI.

flashcards.front: What token does Firebase Auth issue?
flashcards.back: A short-lived JWT ID token; other Firebase services verify it automatically.
Server-set fields (roles/tenants) embedded in the user's token, enforced via Security Rules.
auth.userChanges() or authStateChanges() streams; drives your UI on login/logout.

options: The Admin SDK on your server
quiz.explain: Only privileged server code can set custom claims.

quiz.q: For reactive login UI, listen to…
quiz.explain: Stream of the current user; UI rebuilds on change.
It attests the request comes from your genuine app before Firebase serves it.

challenges.text: Add Google Sign-In and merge with an existing email account.
Set custom claims from a Cloud Function admin endpoint; refresh the token.
Turn on App Check and adapt clients for attestation.

interviewQuestions: How does Firebase Auth propagate identity to other Firebase services?
What are custom claims and when use them?
How do you support Apple Sign-In requirements?
How do you handle token refresh and revocation?
How does anonymous auth work and when link accounts?
